ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Temperature, Humidity, Ambient) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each sensor for better identification */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor needs to be calibrated (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "installation_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sensor is installed (relevant for soil sensors) */,
  "installation_height" REAL /* Height at which the sensor is installed (relevant for air sensors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location above sea level */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data recording */,
  "value" REAL /* Value recorded by the sensor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, questionable) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor (if applicable) */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data recording */,
  "temp_plant_1" REAL /* Temperature of Plant 1 */,
  "temp_plant_5" REAL /* Temperature of Plant 5 */,
  "temp_plant_6" REAL /* Temperature of Plant 6 */,
  "air_temp_loc" REAL /* Air temperature at the location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the location */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature */,
  "ambient_1" REAL /* Ambient temperature 1 */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Soil temperature */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity */,
  "co2_level" REAL /* CO2 level */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Oxygen level */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, agronomist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for emergency contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, agronomy, IT) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts in the last 24 hours (for security purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alarm */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., temperature high, humidity low) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alarm */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alarm (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alarm was resolved */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alarm */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., upper limit, lower limit) */,
  "notification_sent" TEXT /* Flag to indicate if a notification was sent (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the report file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "generated_by_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user who generated the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  "calibration_results" TEXT /* Results of the calibration (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
